wordmark.purpose: FELOOSY app name in the AppBar only. Never used for headings or decorative text. Identity mark.

headline.purpose: Remaining budget or wallet balance — the hero number. Always the largest, heaviest element on the screen.

title.purpose: Card headers, section labels, dialog titles.

body.purpose: Transaction descriptions, category names, all supporting text. Never below 14sp.

label.purpose: Stat chip labels, date headers, percentage captions, all secondary metadata.

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: All cards and containers. Depth comes from tonal layering only — no shadows on surfaces.

shadows.name: fab-lift
shadows.purpose: FABs only — a faint directional shadow to lift them off scrolling content. Structural, not decorative.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default state transitions: color changes, background tints, opacity.

motion.name: ease-out-quick
motion.purpose: Elements entering or expanding: chip selection, container reveals.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Instant feedback: button press, tap ripple, toggle state.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Container transitions: chip selection, type toggle color change.

components.name: FilledButton (Primary)
components.description: Primary action button. Fern green in light mode, Ice Glow in dark mode. Used for Set Budget, Save, Confirm.
components.css: .ds-btn-filled { background: #639922; color: #ffffff; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1px; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 16px; cursor: pointer; min-height: 48px; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-filled:hover { background: #5A8A40; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-filled:active { transform: translateY(0); background: #4A7130; } .ds-btn-filled:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #639922; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: TextButton
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent background, Fern text. Used for Cancel, See All, navigation links.
components.css: .ds-btn-text { background: transparent; color: #639922; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 16px; cursor: pointer; min-height: 48px; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-text:hover { background: rgba(99,153,34,0.08); } .ds-btn-text:active { background: rgba(99,153,34,0.16); } .ds-btn-text:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #639922; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: FAB — Expense
components.description: Primary expense entry point. Bottom-right. Ledger Red with a minus icon. The most-tapped element in the app.
components.html: <button class="ds-fab-expense" aria-label="Add expense"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M5 12h14" stroke="white" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-fab-expense { background: #D64545; color: white; width: 56px; height: 56px; border: none; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 3px 8px rgba(214,69,69,0.35); transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-fab-expense:hover { background: #C43535; transform: scale(1.06); box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(214,69,69,0.45); } .ds-fab-expense:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-fab-expense:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D64545; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: FAB — Income
components.description: Primary income entry point. Bottom-left. Ledger Green with a plus icon.
components.html: <button class="ds-fab-income" aria-label="Add income"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" stroke="white" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-fab-income { background: #4A9955; color: white; width: 56px; height: 56px; border: none; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 3px 8px rgba(74,153,85,0.35); transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-fab-income:hover { background: #3D8047; transform: scale(1.06); box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(74,153,85,0.45); } .ds-fab-income:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-fab-income:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4A9955; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: All card-like containers. Flat, zero elevation, 16dp radius, 1dp border. Budget summary, stat containers, etc.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #C4D4C4; border: 1px solid #B8CABC; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; color: #4A5E40; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-amount { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; color: #4A9955; margin: 0 0 2px 0; line-height: 1.1; } .ds-card-sublabel { font-size: 12px; color: #4A5E40; margin: 0; }

components.name: Transaction Tile
components.description: Signature list item. Category icon in tinted circle, description and category sub-label, right-aligned semantic amount. Expense rows have a faint red background tint; income rows a faint green tint.
components.html:
Grocery runFood & Dining
-AED 85
components.css: .ds-tx-tile { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 12px 16px 12px 28px; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; gap: 12px; background: rgba(214,69,69,0.04); } .ds-tx-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-tx-body { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; min-width: 0; } .ds-tx-desc { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #2C2C2C; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-tx-cat { font-size: 12px; color: #4A5E40; } .ds-tx-amount { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-tx-expense { color: #D64545; } .ds-tx-income { color: #4A9955; }

components.name: Type Toggle (Expense / Income)
components.description: Two-chip transaction type selector. Expense chip uses Ledger Red tones when selected; Income uses Ledger Green. Animated 180ms ease-out.
components.css: .ds-type-toggle { display: flex; gap: 8px; font-family: Roboto, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-chip { padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 24px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border: 1.5px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; color: #4A5E40; min-height: 36px; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), color 180ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-chip-exp-sel { background: #F6E5E5; border-color: #D64545; color: #D64545; } .ds-chip-inc-sel { background: #E5F2E7; border-color: #4A9955; color: #4A9955; } .ds-chip-inc:hover, .ds-chip:not(.ds-chip-exp-sel):not(.ds-chip-inc-sel):hover { background: #E4EBDE; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #639922; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
FELOOSY is a personal budgeting app that earns its simplicity. The design philosophy is not minimalism as an aesthetic — it is restraint in service of a single user task: knowing where you stand, instantly. Every screen should feel like opening a well-kept paper ledger: each entry in its place, confident spacing, nothing decorative, nothing performing.

The palette is nature-anchored in light mode (Fern green over Mint Mist) and shifts to a cool deep-water darkness for night use. Both themes feel deliberate, not fashionable. The two FABs are the only saturated color on the home screen at rest — their rarity is the signal.

The system explicitly rejects analysis-heavy dashboards, corporate bank app coldness, and the gamified cartoon warmth of apps like Monefy. If it looks like it is trying to teach the user something, it is wrong.
keyCharacteristics: Flat surfaces with tonal layering — no shadows, no elevation drama
Numbers are the visual hero — balance and amounts are always the largest element on screen
Deliberate and spacious — comfortable margins, generous touch targets, never cramped
Two named color families: Grove (light) and Nimbus (dark), with three shared semantic colors
Semantic coloring: Ledger Red and Ledger Green are locked to expense/income meaning across every screen

rules.name: The Semantic Parity Rule
rules.body: Ledger Red and Ledger Green are the only colors with locked meaning. They must never appear in non-semantic contexts.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Fern (light) and Ice Glow (dark) appear on no more than 15% of any given screen surface. Their scarcity is their authority.

rules.name: The No-Gray Rule
rules.body: Every neutral carries a tint toward the brand hue. Pure #808080 is forbidden. Placeholder text uses Grove Shadow; disabled states use onSurface at 38% opacity.

rules.name: The Number-First Rule
rules.body: On any screen with a balance or amount, that number uses the largest size and highest weight on screen. If a label is competing with a number, the label is winning incorrectly.

rules.name: The Wordmark Boundary
rules.body: Rajdhani is used for the FELOOSY logotype only. Not for headings, labels, or decorative text.

rules.name: The Flat Register Rule
rules.body: Shadows are prohibited on cards, containers, and inputs. A desire to add a shadow is a signal to step the container color darker instead. FABs are the only exception.

dos: Do use Ledger Red and Ledger Green exclusively for semantic expense/income contexts.
Do make the balance or remaining amount the largest, heaviest type on any screen that shows a number.
Do use tonal surface steps for depth — no shadows on containers.
Do keep touch targets a minimum of 48dp tall.
Do use cs.error for destructive actions, not Ledger Red.
Do use generous whitespace to communicate grouping.
Do apply 16dp radius uniformly to all card-like containers.
Do hide both FABs when the keyboard is open or search is active.
donts: Don't add charts, graphs, pie charts, or trend visualizations as primary UI elements.
Don't replicate the Monefy aesthetic: no bright cartoon colors, no icon-grid home screen, no pie chart as hero.
Don't use a corporate bank app style: no navy headers, no gold accents, no cold formal typography.
Don't add shadows to cards, containers, or inputs. The Flat Register Rule is not a preference.
Don't use Ledger Red or Ledger Green in non-semantic contexts.
Don't use Rajdhani outside the FELOOSY wordmark.
Don't use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF for text or surfaces.
Don't add complexity as a feature.
Don't use Amber Mark decoratively — it is a warning signal only.
